scenario: Imported 33 NotebookLM notebooks worth of content without scoring or filtering. System became bloated with redundant and low-quality atoms that degraded retrieval quality.
action_taken: Implemented 5-criterion admission gate. Re-processed all imported content, rejected 40% as below threshold.
failure_mode: Unfiltered bulk import degrades system quality and retrieval relevance
recovery_tactic: Every atom must pass weighted admission scoring before entering the system. No bulk imports without the gate.

scenario: Extracted 'experience' atoms from training doc that were actually just prose descriptions with no actionable tactical content. Agents loaded them but got no behavioral improvement.
trigger: Classification error: prose classified as tactical experience
action_taken: Added requirement that experience records must have non-empty action_taken and outcome fields. Prose without these is classified as 'reference' instead.
failure_mode: Non-actionable text in experience bank wastes context and provides no tactical guidance
recovery_tactic: Experience atoms must have: scenario + action_taken + outcome at minimum. If any are empty, reclassify as reference.

scenario: External skill library evaluated without control test. Atoms admitted based on apparent quality but showed no measurable improvement when tested against base model alone.
action_taken: Added mandatory control eval for external skill evaluation: base model alone vs base model + external atoms. Only admit if measurable improvement demonstrated.
failure_mode: External atoms that look good on paper but do not improve actual performance are worse than no atoms -- they consume context without benefit
recovery_tactic: External evaluate mode requires: parse -> score -> control eval -> only admit atoms with demonstrated improvement.
